description: Demonstrates the structured quest system end-to-end with no AIGM required. On start, a `start_quest` trigger begins the authored quest `demo_clear_the_camp` (OBJECTIVE → "Scout the bandit camp"). When the fight begins, a `set_flag camp_scouted` trigger completes the scout step (OBJECTIVE → "Defeat the bandits", +25 XP). Killing both bandits satisfies the `enemies_alive == 0` step condition, completing the quest (+100 step XP, +50 quest XP). Open the Quest Log from the OBJECTIVE line to watch the checklist tick over.
customIntroduction: Smoke threads up from a hollow beside the east road — a bandit camp, two figures on watch. They see you the same moment you see them.
customContext: QUEST DEMO. The structured quest 'demo_clear_the_camp' is started by the encounter's start_quest trigger; its steps auto-advance via their conditions. Do not call start_quest/advance_quest yourself — the triggers and QuestSystem handle it. Two bandits, hostile from the start, no parley.

then.message: You have a clear view of the camp now.
